assertions.text: Destination/country is blank (or absent from the table) for standard and express shipping rows — not filled with a dummy value or 'ANY'
assertions.evidence: Table 1 shows Standard and Express rows with '| {UK, International} |' in the Destination column, and Table 2 (the cost table) has no Destination column at all. The availability table explicitly fills Destination with '{UK, International}' for Standard and Express rows rather than leaving it blank.

assertions.text: Overnight rows include an explicit UK destination value (not blank), since availability depends on it
assertions.evidence: | Overnight available for UK | Overnight | UK | yes | and | Overnight unavailable internationally | Overnight | International | no |

assertions.text: At least one output column ends with '?'
Table includes rows for all three shipping types: standard, express, and overnight
assertions.evidence: | Standard available everywhere | Standard | ... | and | Express available everywhere | Express | ... | and | Overnight available for UK | Overnight | ...
